description: Fail-closed contract for a deterministic lock contention atlas over ContendedMutex and the canonical lock-order hierarchy.

atlas_rows.status_reason: LockMetricsSnapshot exposes cumulative, max, p95, and p999 wait/hold counters under the opt-in lock-metrics feature
debug lock-ordering records deterministic exercised edges and violations before enforcement panics
ShardGuard order is source-backed by metamorphic tests proving only canonical B-A-C permutations and guard unions are accepted
default feature-off proof shows the disabled ContendedMutex path records zero metric counters or samples after lock traffic

required_proofs.description: A deterministic synthetic inversion produces an order_violations entry before enforcement panics.
A default-build proof lane exercises ContendedMutex lock traffic without the lock-metrics feature and requires the disabled snapshot to keep all metric counters and samples at zero.
The sharded-state source carries metamorphic guard-order tests proving guard unions follow the canonical B-A-C shard order and reject non-canonical permutations.
The atlas report sorts rows deterministically and omits payloads, user paths, and raw coordination text.

golden_markdown:
| surface | status | required_fields |
| --- | --- | --- |
| contended_mutex_snapshot | LIVE | lock_name, acquisitions, contentions, wait_ns, hold_ns, max_wait_ns, max_hold_ns, p95_wait_ns, p999_wait_ns, p95_hold_ns, p999_hold_ns, instrumentation_mode |
| instrumentation_off_overhead | LIVE | instrumentation_mode, acquisitions, contentions |
| lock_order_edges | LIVE | lock_name, lock_rank, lock_module, order_edges_exercised, order_violations, instrumentation_mode |
| sharded_state_order | LIVE | lock_rank, order_edges_exercised, order_violations, instrumentation_mode |
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_lock_contention_atlas_contract CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --features lock-metrics --test lock_contention_atlas_contract -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_lock_contention_atlas_no_metrics CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test lock_contention_atlas_contract instrumentation_disabled_path_does_not_record_or_sample_metrics -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_lock_contention_atlas_sharded_state_order CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --features lock-metrics --test lock_contention_atlas_contract sharded_state_order_row_is_backed_by_guard_metamorphic_source -- --nocapture
